mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_base_vector_task SET status = 'PROCESSING', lock_owner = #{lockOwner}, locked_at = NOW(), started_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE knowledge_base_vector_task SET status = 'PENDING', lock_owner = NULL, locked_at = NULL, started_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(), error_message = 'task timeout, reset to pending' WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND locked_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE) AND retry_count < max_retry_count

UPDATE knowledge_base_vector_task SET status = 'FAILED', finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), error_message = 'task timeout and max retry reached' WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND locked_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE) AND retry_count >= max_retry_count
